policy: Full Fundstrat transcripts are stored only in the private source vault.

items.title: Interim Deal Underpins a Constructive Framework as Industrials Break Out and Semis Rebound
items.completeness_notes: Logged-in Fundstrat technical-strategy video detail page showed Vimeo Transcript control; complete player-exposed VTT caption track captured from the same iframe metadata.
items.short_synthesis: Newton stayed near-term bullish as lower WTI, yields, and USD improved the cross-asset backdrop, while flagging FOMC/gap-fill resistance and emphasizing Industrials breadth plus Semiconductor support levels.

items.title: Geopolitical Tailwinds May Give Warsh Room to Lean Dovish, HYPE Reclaims Leadership
items.completeness_notes: Logged-in Fundstrat video detail page showed Vimeo Transcript control; visible panel was virtualized, so the complete player-exposed VTT caption track was captured from the same iframe metadata.
items.short_synthesis: Farrell framed lower crude/yields after US-Iran progress as a better liquidity backdrop for crypto, while keeping Strategy reserve coverage as the key unfinished risk and noting HYPE leadership recovery.
